mapper.select: select template_id, template_name, message_type, title_template, content_template, channel_list, status, update_time, created_at, updated_at, created_by, updated_by, deleted from message_templates where template_id = #{templateId} and deleted = false
mapper.insert: insert into message_templates ( template_name, message_type, title_template, content_template, channel_list, status, update_time, created_at, updated_at, created_by, updated_by, deleted ) values ( #{templateName}, #{messageType}, #{titleTemplate}, #{contentTemplate}, #{channelList, typeHandler=com.studylib.common.persistence.typehandler.CommaSeparatedStringListTypeHandler}, #{status}, #{updateTime}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, #{createdBy}, #{updatedBy}, #{deleted} )
mapper.update: update message_templates set template_name = #{templateName}, message_type = #{messageType}, title_template = #{titleTemplate}, content_template = #{contentTemplate}, channel_list = #{channelList, typeHandler=com.studylib.common.persistence.typehandler.CommaSeparatedStringListTypeHandler}, status = #{status}, update_time = #{updateTime}, updated_at = #{updatedAt}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, deleted = #{deleted} where template_id = #{templateId} and deleted = false
